title: Holstebro, Central Jutland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Holstebro is a city in Central Jutland with a population of 37,000. A cultural center in western Jutland, known for its modern art museum, sculpture park, and theater.
